title: SHATCHI 100 pcs Bouncy Jet Balls 27mm Party Bag Fillers Boys Girls Loot Bag Toys Kids Gifts Xmas Christmas Stocking Fillers

😃 Premium Quality: The bouncing balls for kids are made of safe & non-toxic rubber materials and are durable & strong. Useful to bounce, throw, catch etc, keeping them busy for long periods at a time. Great to give our as small toys for prizes & rubber balls for kids school prizes.

😃 Bouncy Fun for Everyone - Useful for many occasions, such as bouncy balls for kid’s party bags and Christmas stocking fillers, lucky dips, tombolas, classroom prizes, Halloween goodie bags. They can be played with indoors and outdoors.
😃 Size: 27mm Diameter. Great party bag favours toys for both boys and girls best choice for the loot bag fillers, pinata fillers, Easter eggs hunting, birthday gifts, school classroom rewards.

😃 Safety First: (Choking hazard) our bouncing balls are measuring 27mm diameter which is bigger in size than others, however are not suitable for children under 5 years old. Children should always play under the supervision of an adult.
